calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cheryl Anderson for Mary Stluka.

The Court asked if there was anything additional to report. Ms. Anderson stated that the two people who would be affected have consented and that it is agreed that 1/7 belongs to the children. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)
